# Fasal Suraksha (कृषि सुरक्षा)

> Parametric crop insurance that pays out automatically — no claims, no paperwork, no waiting.

## Project Overview
Fasal Suraksha is a next-generation parametric insurance dApp designed for smallholder farmers in India.
It utilizes Polygon Amoy testnet smart contracts and Chainlink oracles to trigger automated payouts based on satellite NDVI data and IMD rainfall APIs.

## Architecture
1. **Sentinel-2 Satellite** -> NDVI < 0.3
2. **IMD Rainfall API** -> Rainfall Data
3. **Chainlink Oracle** -> Trigger Event
4. **Smart Contract** -> TX Confirmed
5. **Razorpay API** -> Payout Request
6. **UPI Payout** -> Farmer's Bank Account

## Important Links
- GitHub Repository: https://github.com/iZiaur/Fasal-Suraksha
- Live Demo: https://fasalsuraksha.vercel.app/
- Farmer Dashboard: https://fasalsuraksha.vercel.app/dashboard
- Admin Dashboard: https://fasalsuraksha.vercel.app/admin
